{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "powershell.exe was launched with an encoded command (-enc), a common technique used for obfuscation by malware. The decoded portion of the command checks the PowerShell version, which is also a common characteristic of malicious scripts.",
  "indicators": [
    "powershell.exe",
    "-enc",
    "EncodedCommand",
    "obfuscation",
    "cmd.exe parent"
  ]
